title: Pan-Fried Goose Breast with Crispy Crust
description: A crispy-skinned goose breast dish, pan-fried to perfection. This recipe combines sweet and savory flavors, creating a delicious meal.
instructions: Season the goose breast with salt and black pepper.
In a shallow dish, mix together the flour and a pinch of salt.
Dredge the goose breast in the flour mixture, shaking off excess.
Heat the goose fat in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the goose breast for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until browned.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast for 12-15 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the goose is cooking, stir-fry the crispy fried onions in a small pan until crispy.
To serve, slice the goose breast and top with a dollop of sour cream and crispy onions.
